applied_optimizations.name: torch.compile with mode=default
applied_optimizations.description: Applied torch.compile(mode='default', dynamic=False) to the ModelNew class. Disabled triton.cudagraphs, triton.cudagraph_trees, and max_autotune for AMD ROCm compatibility. Set float32 matmul precision to 'high'.

attempted_but_failed.name: Custom Triton BN+ReLU+Conv fusion kernel
attempted_but_failed.reason: Triton doesn't support 'continue' statements in loops, and nested loops with dynamic ranges are problematic. Also, computing batch statistics for BatchNorm training mode in Triton is complex.

attempted_but_failed.name: torch.compile without dynamic=False
attempted_but_failed.reason: Hit Triton compiler errors with async copy operations (ttg.async_copy_global_to_local) when compiling convolution kernels on AMD ROCm.
attempted_but_failed.error: failed to legalize operation 'ttg.async_copy_global_to_local' that was explicitly marked illegal

notes: Conv2D operations dominate at 56.8% of GPU time, already using MIOpen optimized assembly kernels
BatchNorm+ReLU is already fused by torch.compile's Triton kernels
Remaining optimization opportunities: reduce cat overhead, but custom Triton kernel for full DenseNet block would be very complex

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output again - this is the 3rd consecutive stall. The agent needs extremely explicit, copy-pasteable instructions. With 45 minutes remaining, giving one final attempt with channels
